title: ChemistCat's Arts
description: This mod aims to add immersive music-writing.
body: Use the tuning table to create new songs from paper and ink, which can also be played on one of the four new instruments! Create arcane ink which allows you to enchant your music, similar to spells. The golden harp allows you to conjure notes, maybe for creating a wall, or a staicase whenever you need it. There are elemenal ink created from various resources from biomes. Adding these elemental ink to a song creates an elemental note paper. When played they protect you and all nearby players from the element. There is fire (not lava), drowning, freezing, and falling. This can be a lot of fun in multiplayer, but also allows for QoL in singleplayer.
